---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Akmon
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or use case

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like (e.g. new flag, new matcher type, new output format, new eBPF probe).

Which area does it touch?

- [ ] Core monitor (`cmd/`, `internal/`)
- [ ] eBPF programs (`bpf/`)
- [ ] Dashboard / UI (`ui/`)
- [ ] Detection templates → should this be in [akmon-templates](https://github.com/ClawGuard-Labs/akmon-templates) instead?
- [ ] Nuclei integration
- [ ] Packaging / install / systemd

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you preferred the proposed one.

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, or references to similar behavior in other tools.
